gig_title: I will deploy an AI support agent for your SaaS product
handles: onboarding, billing, feature how-tos, tier-1 troubleshooting

deploy_spec.escalation: auto handoff to human on low confidence
deploy_spec.note: Self-hosted stack; no per-seat SaaS fees.

delivery_steps: 1. Collect KB source (docs + changelog + help center)
2. Train bot on Hermes/OpenClaw + build intents
3. Deploy on Chatwoot across: in-app widget + email + Slack
